purpose: Per-listing photo authorizations the pipeline should preserve verbatim, plus operator-supplied URLs for listings where the auto Tavily lookup returned nothing usable. Matched against scraped listings by `mls_number` first, then by `area + street` as a fallback. Operator instructions: to assign a new manually-sourced photo to a scraped listing, copy the photo file into /public/images/foreclosure/listings/, then add a record below with `mls_number` (preferred) or `area + street`, and re-run `node scripts/curate-deals.mjs`.
